title: xyris serotina var. curtissii
intro: Xyris serotina var. curtissii, also known as Curtiss' yellow-eyed-grass, is a plant species belonging to the family Xyridaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Xyris serotina var. curtissii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
